title: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
summary: Trump earned over $1 billion from cryptocurrency investments in his first year back in office, more than doubling his previous reported annual income of $600 million. This significant increase reflects both expanded crypto holdings and asset appreciation. The disclosure highlights the intersection of political leadership and substantial personal financial interests in emerging technology.
content: It compares with more than $600m in total income that Trump reported in his last financial disclosure.

zh.title: 特朗普在重返政界第一年从加密货币中赚得超过10亿美元
zh.summary: 特朗普在重返政界的第一年从加密货币投资中赚得超过10亿美元，远超其之前报告的年收入600万美元。这一显著增长反映了加密货币持有量的扩大和资产升值。该披露突显了政治领导力与新兴技术领域巨大个人财务利益的交集。

title: Why Asia still struggles to create its own mega-IPOs like SpaceX
summary: Despite abundant entrepreneurs, engineers, and massive domestic markets, Asia has failed to produce mega-IPOs comparable to U.S. listings like SpaceX. The region's lag in blockbuster public market debuts reveals structural or regulatory barriers preventing comparable scale. Understanding this gap is crucial for Asian economies seeking to compete in global capital markets.
content: Asia has no shortage of entrepreneurs, engineers or giant domestic markets. Yet when it comes to producing the kind of blockbuster listings seen in the U.S., the region continues to lag.

zh.title: 为什么亚洲仍难以创造像SpaceX这样的大型首次公开募股
zh.summary: 尽管亚洲拥有众多企业家、工程师和庞大的国内市场，但该地区未能产生与美国上市公司（如SpaceX）相当的大型首次公开募股。该地区在轰动性公开市场首次亮相中的落后表明存在结构性或监管障碍，阻止了类似规模。理解这一差距对于寻求在全球资本市场竞争的亚洲经济体至关重要。

title: Anthropic says Trump admin has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
summary: The Trump administration has removed export controls on Anthropic's AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5, potentially expanding their global availability. This regulatory change reflects shifting U.S. policy on artificial intelligence exports and competitive positioning. The decision could accelerate international adoption of these advanced AI systems.
content: The U.S. Department of Commerce lifted the export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models

zh.title: Anthropic称特朗普政府已解除对Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5的出口管制
zh.summary: 特朗普政府已取消对Anthropic公司AI模型Fable 5和Mythos 5的出口管制，可能扩大其全球可用性。这一监管变化反映了美国在人工智能出口和竞争定位政策上的转变。该决定可能加速这些先进AI系统的国际采纳。

title: Yen slides to new 40-year low while Dow futures ease after strongest first half in five years: Live updates
summary: The Japanese yen has reached its lowest level in 40 years while U.S. stock markets posted their strongest first-half performance in five years, with the Dow up 8.9%. These currency and equity movements reflect broader shifts in global economic conditions and investor sentiment. The divergence highlights different economic pressures facing Japan versus the U.S.
content: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 8.9% in the first half of 2026.

zh.title: 日元跌至40年低点，道指在创五年最强上半年表现后小幅回调：实时更新
zh.summary: 日元已跌至40年来的最低水平，而美国股市创造了五年来最强劲的上半年表现，道指上涨8.9%。这些货币和股市波动反映了全球经济条件和投资者情绪的更广泛变化。这种分化突显了日本和美国面临的不同经济压力。

title: Nike earnings crushed Wall Street’s estimates — but here’s the catch
summary: Nike's earnings and gross margins exceeded Wall Street expectations, but gains were primarily driven by a tariff refund rather than operational improvements. The underlying business performance appears weaker than headline results suggest, raising sustainability questions. This distinction is important for investors evaluating the company's fundamental health.
content: Nike’s profit and gross margins were buoyed by a tariff refund.

zh.title: 耐克收益远超华尔街预期——但这里有个问题
zh.summary: 耐克的收益和毛利率超过了华尔街的预期，但增长主要由关税退款驱动，而非运营改善。潜在的业务表现看起来比头条数字所示的要弱，引发了可持续性问题。这一区别对投资者评估公司的基本健康状况很重要。
